clusters.justification: This domain encompasses broad emotional valence, systemic arousal, and autonomic reactivity, reflecting the macroscopic co-activation patterns of the brain's salience and limbic systems.
This domain reflects the computation of reward, incentive processing, and motivated decision-making mediated by macroscopic striatal and ventromedial prefrontal circuitry.
This domain captures internally directed representations governing self-referential thought and the simulation of subjective states in others, typically engaging large-scale default mode circuitry.
